trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 69.1 in the sweet spot, MACD confirmed bullish crossover, Corning's optical fiber and display glass business well-positioned for AI infrastructure buildout.
Score 90 with RSI 64.5, MACD bullish crossover, dominant AI GPU market position with continued data center demand supporting the trend.
Score 95 with all three momentum signals aligned — RSI 67.9, MACD bullish crossover, and histogram rising — optical networking beneficiary at an approachable price.
Score 95 with clean momentum setup, RSI 65.1, price 7.6% above SMA-20, and affordable entry that allows meaningful share count within remaining cash.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted mildly higher today in a low-conviction session — the kind of tape where momentum leaders quietly extend gains while nothing dramatic happens. We had 4 open slots and $1,208 in idle cash, so deploying into four score-95 candidates (plus NVDA at 90) made sense rather than sitting flat. Existing positions show no stop-loss triggers, so no trimming needed.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets posted modest gains on June 2, with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ up 0.2%, reflecting a lack of strong catalysts in either direction. Investors largely held positions ahead of upcoming economic data, resulting in low-volatility, range-bound trading across major indices. Semiconductor and optical networking names quietly outperformed, supported by ongoing AI infrastructure investment themes.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市6月2日小幅收升，標普500指數與納斯達克指數均上漲0.2%，反映市場在缺乏明確催化劑的情況下呈現觀望格局。投資者在等待即將公布的經濟數據之際，普遍維持現有部位，令主要指數在低波動區間窄幅盤整。半導體及光纖網絡板塊悄然跑贏大市，受惠於人工智能基礎設施持續投資的主題支撐。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is the strategy of buying stocks that have been trending upward, on the premise that assets that have performed well recently tend to keep performing well in the short term. Traders look for signals like rising RSI (relative strength), MACD crossovers, and price above moving averages — exactly the filters used in today's buy decisions. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply if sentiment shifts.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期持續上漲的股票，其理論基礎在於短期內表現強勁的資產往往具有延續性。交易者會尋找RSI上升、MACD金叉以及股價站上均線等技術信號——這正是今日買入決策所採用的篩選邏輯。此策略的風險在於，一旦市場情緒轉向，動能可能急速逆轉。
